rulings.Case Title: EDWARD PHILLIPS et al VS. AMERICAN ASBESTOS COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 17, 2008 LINE 4. DEFENDANT FLOWSERVE US, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN. MERE RELIANCE ON STANDARD INTERROGATORIES AND THE TESTIMONY OF DECEDENT'S WIFE FAILS TO MEET SCHEIDING V DINWIDDIE CONSTRUCTION CO. (1999) 69 CAL APP 4TH 64. MERELY PROPOUNDING SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES DOES NOT CURE THE PROBLEM, NOR DOES FILING THE RESPONSES WITH THE REPLY. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: ONE CLARENCE PLACE OWNERS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNI VS. MARTIN PROPERTIES, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 17, 2008 LINE 5. CROSS-DEFENDANT GOLD RIVER CONTRACTORS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AS TO MARTIN PROPERTIES, L.L.C.'S CROSS-COMPLAINT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. HEARING REQUIRED ON THE MARTIN MCNERNEY DEVELOPMENT CROSS-COMPLAINT. PRE-TRIAL ORDER NO. 1 HAS NOT BEEN SUBMITTED. THE BIZIEFF DECLARATION APPEARS TO LACK SUFFICIENT FOUNDATION FOR THE OPINIONS EXPRESSED. THIS APPEARS TO BE A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: JULIE WANG VS. JOANNE M REMING et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 17, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANTS STIMMEL, STIMMEL & SMITH, P.C., LEE STIMMEL AND ANDRINE SMITH'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS TO PLEAD THE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION WITH MORE PARTICULARITY. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO SPELL OUT THE MISREPRESENTATIONS THAT WERE MADE, WHEN THEY WERE MADE AND HOW IT IS PLAINTIFF RELIED UPON THE REPRESENTATIONS, AND WHAT DAMAGES WERE SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT THAT CONSTITUTES SOMETHING OTHER THAN A CLAIM FOR LEGAL MALPRACTICE. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO COUNT TWO FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1782 OF THE CONSUMER LEGAL REMEDIES ACT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CLAIMS FOR UNCONSCIONABLE AND ECONOMIC HARDSHIP. THE LAW DOES NOT RECOGNIZE SUCH CLAIMS AS SEPARATE CAUSES OF ACTION. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT DOES NOT CLEARLY DISCLOSE THAT THE CLAIMS ARE BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. =(302/PJM/PB)
